nasb.text: The sons of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead and took it, and dispossessed the Amorites who were in it.

esv.text: And the sons of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead and captured it, and dispossessed the Amorites who were in it.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西的兒子瑪吉的子孫到基列去，攻取了那地，把住在那裡的亞摩利人趕走。

ccb.text: 玛拿西之子玛吉的子孙占领了基列，赶走了那里的亚摩利人。
